global.description: The ad features a vibrant pink background with promotional text and product imagery.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time flash sale on LuxShelf products.

elements.label: Pink background
elements.description: A vibrant pink background fills the entire canvas, creating a lively atmosphere.

elements.label: LuxShelf logo
elements.description: The logo features a simple, modern design with the text 'LuxShelf' prominently displayed.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A minimalistic representation of two mirrored surfaces, suggesting a product display.

elements.label: Flash sale announcement
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Flash sale live Only this weekend' captures attention.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Only this weekend

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: The text 'LuxShelf' is displayed in a clear, modern font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Start now' encourages immediate action.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: The price '€9.99' is displayed in a bold font, indicating affordability.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge with the word 'SALE' in bold letters, highlighting the promotion.

elements.label: User-generated content
elements.description: The text 'UGC' is displayed in a small badge, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline in the center, with the product display below, and the CTA at the bottom.
